recommendations.title: Sovereign
recommendations.overview: Struggling single father Jerry indoctrinates his son Joe into the sovereign citizen movement, teaching him that laws are mere illusions and freedom is something you take. But, as Jerry’s ideology consumes them, they are set on a collision course with

recommendations.title: An Autumn Romance
recommendations.overview: When librarian Taylor Harris suddenly loses her job, she decides to visit her brother in a small town in Montana. There, she gets involved in the fight to help save her brother's hotel from tycoon Joel Sheenan, who wants to renovate it.

recommendations.title: The Guilty
recommendations.overview: A demoted police officer assigned to a call dispatch desk is conflicted when he receives an emergency phone call from a kidnapped woman.

recommendations.title: Meek's Cutoff
recommendations.overview: A group of settlers traveling through the Oregon High Desert in 1845 find themselves stranded in harsh conditions.

recommendations.title: Angels with Dirty Faces
recommendations.overview: Childhood chums Rocky Sullivan and Jerry Connelly grow up on opposite sides of the fence: Rocky matures into a prominent gangster, while Jerry becomes a priest, tending to the needs of his old tenement neighborhood.

recommendations.title: Some Like It Hot
recommendations.overview: In Prohibition-era Chicago, musicians Joe and Jerry witness a mob hit, and flee the state in an all-female band disguised as Josephine and Daphne, but further complications set in.

recommendations.title: Ruby Sparks
recommendations.overview: Calvin is a young novelist who achieved phenomenal success early in his career but is now struggling with his writing – as well as his romantic life. Finally, he makes a breakthrough and creates a character named Ruby who inspires him. When Calvin fi

recommendations.title: K-911
recommendations.overview: LAPD detective Mike Dooley and his dog, the German Shepherd Jerry Lee, have been successfully partnered for ten years, but Jerry’s advancing age has Dooley’s superiors suggesting retirement and  they are forced to work with a younger K-9 team: female

recommendations.title: Jerry & Marge Go Large
recommendations.overview: The remarkable true story of how retiree Jerry Selbee discovers a mathematical loophole in the Massachusetts lottery and, with the help of his wife, Marge, wins $27 million dollars and uses the money to revive their small Michigan town.

recommendations.title: Three O'Clock High
